recommendations.title: Spring Breakdown
recommendations.overview: Three women in their thirties head to a popular Spring Break destination and try to relive the Spring Break they never had.

recommendations.title: Lifechanger
recommendations.overview: A murderous shapeshifter sets out on a blood-soaked mission to make things right with the woman he loves.

recommendations.title: Inbred
recommendations.overview: Four young offenders and their workers spend a weekend in the remote Yorkshire village of Mortlake, which prides on keeping itself to itself. A minor incident with locals rapidly escalates into a blood-soaked, deliriously warped nightmare.

recommendations.title: Theater Camp
recommendations.overview: After the indomitable and beloved founder of a scrappy theater camp in upstate New York falls into a coma, the eccentric staff must band together with her clueless "crypto-bro" son to keep the thespian paradise afloat.

recommendations.title: Carrossel: O Filme
recommendations.overview: A group of friends finds their fun at vacation camp ruined when a big corporate developer threatens to build a pollution-spewing factory on the land.

recommendations.title: Return to Sleepaway Camp
recommendations.overview: When campers and staff at Camp Manabe mysteriously begin disappearing and turning into gruesome corpses, paranoid Ronnie can't shake the memory of a series of grisly murders that took place at Camp Arawak two decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Bad Milo!
recommendations.overview: A horror comedy centered on a guy who learns that his unusual stomach problems are being caused by a demon living in his intestines.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Mark
recommendations.overview: An exorcist priest meets a family that has a daughter who is pursued by a demon.

recommendations.title: The Jack in the Box: Awakening
recommendations.overview: When a vintage Jack-in-the-box is opened by a dying woman, she enters into a deal with the demon within that would see her illness cured in return for helping it claim six innocent victims.

recommendations.title: AquaSlash
recommendations.overview: Thrills, Chills and Screwball-Comedy meet Tiny Bikinis and G o R y  dismemberment in this Chlorine & Blood drenched Murder-Mystery.
